title: state: broadcast_to_group guards symmetry is correct and well-documented
description: relay/src/state.rs:258-342: The dual membership check (live delivery + offline enqueue) with a clear GUARD SYMMETRY comment is genuinely well-done. The memoization of is_group_member per-pub_id is also correct (avoids O(N*connections) DB queries for multi-device users). The subscription check before enqueue prevents storage abuse by unsubscribed users. A future contributor might try to simplify by removing the offline re-check, arguing the live check suffices; the comment explains why both are needed when a member departs between list-fetch and fan-out.
